allow: Bash(python test.py --text "I'm so happy and excited, today was amazing!")
Bash(python test.py --text "I feel exhausted and a little sad")

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request,urllib.parse; data=urllib.parse.urlencode\({'text':'I am so happy and excited today'}\).encode\(\); req=urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:8000/',data=data\); html=urllib.request.urlopen\(req\).read\(\).decode\(\); print\('STATUS: page returned', len\(html\),'bytes'\); print\('Has mood banner:', 'You' in html and 'feeling' in html\); import re; m=re.search\(r'feeling \(\\w+\)',html\); print\('Detected mood:', m.group\(1\) if m else 'NONE'\); print\('Songs found:', html.count\('class=\\"song\\"'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request,urllib.parse; data=urllib.parse.urlencode\({'text':'I am so happy and excited today'}\).encode\(\); req=urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:8000/',data=data\); html=urllib.request.urlopen\(req\).read\(\).decode\(\); import re; print\('Mood banner:', re.search\(r'feeling \(\\w+\)',html\).group\(1\)\); print\('Sentiment line:', re.search\(r'Sentiment: \(\\w+\)',html\).group\(1\)\); print\('First song:', re.search\(r'class=\\"title\\">\([^<]+\)',html\).group\(1\)\)")
